name: Unnamed Project

entity_types.name: ProfessionalPlayer
entity_types.description: Professional esports player competing in leagues like LCK

attributes.name: player_name
attributes.description: Full name or in-game handle of the player

attributes.name: role
attributes.description: In-game role (e.g., top, jungle, mid, ADC, support)

attributes.name: team_affiliation
attributes.description: Current team the player is part of

entity_types.name: Coach
entity_types.description: Head coach or coaching staff of an esports team

attributes.name: coach_name
attributes.description: Full name of the coach

attributes.name: team_coached
attributes.description: Team the coach is currently coaching

entity_types.name: EsportsTeam
entity_types.description: Professional esports team competing in leagues

attributes.name: team_name
attributes.description: Official name of the esports team

attributes.name: league
attributes.description: League the team competes in (e.g., LCK)

entity_types.name: LeagueOrganization
entity_types.description: Organization that runs esports leagues and tournaments

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: Name of the league organization

attributes.name: league_managed
attributes.description: League managed by the organization

entity_types.name: Analyst
entity_types.description: Esports analyst or commentator providing insights and predictions

attributes.name: analyst_name
attributes.description: Full name or alias of the analyst

attributes.name: affiliation
attributes.description: Media outlet or organization the analyst is associated with

examples: Professional esports analyst mentioned in the text

entity_types.name: MediaOutlet
entity_types.description: Media organization reporting on esports news and events

attributes.name: outlet_name
attributes.description: Name of the media outlet

attributes.name: coverage_focus
attributes.description: Primary focus of coverage (e.g., esports, gaming)

entity_types.name: FanGroup
entity_types.description: Group of fans supporting a specific team or player

attributes.name: group_name
attributes.description: Name or identifier of the fan group

attributes.name: supported_entity
attributes.description: Team or player the group supports

entity_types.name: Sponsor
entity_types.description: Company or brand sponsoring esports teams or events

attributes.name: sponsor_name
attributes.description: Name of the sponsoring company

attributes.name: sponsored_entity
attributes.description: Team or event sponsored

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: Any individual not covered by more specific types (e.g., casual fans, general public)

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: Full name of the individual

attributes.name: role_description
attributes.description: Brief description of the person's role or identity

examples: Social media user commenting on HLE

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: Any organization not covered by more specific types (e.g., small groups, temporary associations)

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: Name of the organization

attributes.name: purpose
attributes.description: Purpose or focus of the organization

edge_types.name: PLAYS_FOR
edge_types.description: Player is a member of an esports team

edge_types.name: COACHES
edge_types.description: Coach leads or trains an esports team

edge_types.name: COMPETES_IN
edge_types.description: Team participates in a league or tournament

edge_types.name: REPORTS_ON
edge_types.description: Media outlet or analyst covers esports events or teams

edge_types.name: SUPPORTS
edge_types.description: Fan group or individual supports a team or player

edge_types.name: SPONSORS
edge_types.description: Company provides sponsorship to a team or event

edge_types.name: CRITICIZES
edge_types.description: Analyst or media outlet criticizes a team or player's performance

edge_types.name: RESPONDS_TO
edge_types.description: Team or player responds to criticism or reports

analysis_summary: 文本内容聚焦于英雄联盟LCK联赛中HLE战队在2026赛季的表现分析，涉及选手、教练、战队、联赛组织、分析师、媒体、粉丝等多方主体。基于此，设计了8个具体实体类型（如职业选手、教练、战队等）和2个兜底类型（Person和Organization），以覆盖所有可在社交媒体上发声和互动的实体。关系类型反映了社媒互动中的常见联系，如支持、报道、批评等，适用于舆论模拟场景。
simulation_requirement:
您是一位专注于英雄联盟LCK联赛的专业电竞分析师。

您的任务是预测韩华生命电竞（HLE）在2026赛季LCK联赛中的表现。
